scope.strategy: Build the most comprehensive Aedes aegypti intelligence system in the world, full stop.
expansion_order: Anopheles gambiae complex and other primary Anopheles vectors
Culex pipiens complex and other primary Culex vectors

domains.target_state: All materially relevant Aedes aegypti research papers, with metadata, abstracts, legal full text when available, enrichment payloads, and explicit gaps.
current_evidence: artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/source_index.sqlite
artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/literature_enrichment_receipt.json
artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/gaps.json
literature_fulltext_units and literature_fulltext_fts are searchable through search fulltext and literature-answer fallback
required_next_sources: Crossref or PubMed reconciliation for missing DOI and PMID gaps
structured table, supplement, and claim extraction across behavior, resistance, vector competence, ecology, and public-health papers
completion_evidence: CLI answers use full-text chunks when abstract metadata is insufficient
remaining inaccessible full text is represented as structured gaps

domains.target_state: Reference genomes, genes, proteins, transcripts, variants, orthology, barcodes, expression summaries, microbiome links, strains, and resistance markers for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: ncbi_datasets_genome records in the installed source index

ncbi_biosamples maps bounded NCBI BioSample records for Aedes aegypti into queryable sample metadata atoms with accession, strain or isolate, collection date, geography, tissue, isolation source, organization, and linked SRA identifiers when exposed by NCBI.

vectorbase_aedes_genomics maps official VectorBase/VEuPathDB AaegyptiLVP_AGWG GFF, annotated protein FASTA, and GO GAF downloads into queryable genes, transcripts, proteins, and genome_features records with raw-file provenance.
config/source-map.yaml
required_next_sources: NCBI variation links and a larger or complete BioSample mirror beyond the bounded live ingest
additional Aedes aegypti reference, strain, variation, and expression packages
orthology and resistance mutation references
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer gene, protein, variant, strain, barcode, and orthology questions with provenance

domains.target_state: Host seeking, biting, oviposition, mating, flight, circadian, larval, repellent, attraction, and insecticide-response behavior records.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates behavior records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 2,816 behavior records from aedes_literature_facets.
Behavior questions route through the behavior lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.

Dryad Aedes behavior/video dataset manifests map public host-seeking, visual-threat, flight-escape, mating/courtship, male host-attraction, and visual-tracking data files to behavior and media records with DOI, file, license, checksum, size, and download provenance.
required_next_sources: decoded trajectory tables and assay-level rows from Dryad behavior archives
repellent and attractant assay datasets
host-seeking and oviposition experiment metadata
completion_evidence: behavior lane records include behavior type, assay, stimulus, condition, population or strain, source paper or dataset, and provenance locator

domains.target_state: Global Aedes aegypti occurrence, collection, trap, citizen-science, and surveillance observations with date, place, method, certainty, taxon, and provenance.
current_evidence: Hosted artifact contains 82,237 Aedes aegypti GBIF occurrence records plus one GBIF taxonomy record from source gbif_api, with raw page artifacts, payload rows, and zero GBIF gaps in source receipts.
Hosted artifact contains deep Aedes aegypti iNaturalist observation records with raw page artifacts and provenance.
Mosquito Alert Aedes aegypti citizen-science observations are mapped through GBIF dataset 1fef1ead-3d02-495e-8ff1-6aeb01123408 with raw occurrence pages, media metadata, and provenance.
GBIF, iNaturalist, and Mosquito Alert lanes exist, but Ask Insects is not yet a comprehensive observation mirror across all public surveillance systems.
required_next_sources: regional surveillance exports where public
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer global, country, date, and source-specific Aedes observation questions with counts and provenance

domains.target_state: Licensed Aedes aegypti images with observation, body part, life stage, view angle, source, license, and inspectable media locator.
current_evidence: Hosted artifact contains deep Aedes aegypti iNaturalist licensed-photo media records with observation context and provenance.
Mosquito Alert Aedes aegypti still-image records preserve GBIF occurrence context plus image URL, rights holder, creator, and media license payloads.
Image coverage is not yet enriched with body part, life stage, sex, anatomy, or quality labels.
required_next_sources: museum or reference-image collections with licensing
image labels for species, life stage, sex, anatomy, and quality
completion_evidence: image questions return media records with license, source URL, observation context, and provenance

domains.target_state: Public Aedes aegypti videos and motion records for behavior, flight, feeding, oviposition, larval motion, and assay clips.
current_evidence: PMC supplementary-video lane maps curated Aedes aegypti article videos into media records with downloadable video locators.
Ask Insects video questions can return bounded PMC moving-image media records once the lane is installed.

Dryad behavior/video dataset manifests add file-grained public Aedes video/archive records for thermal-infrared host seeking, visual-threat avoidance, looming-threat flight escape, mating/courtship/hearing, male attraction, and visual-tracking datasets without mirroring giant binary archives.
required_next_sources: OSF FlightTrackAI Aedes aegypti flight videos
Mendeley high-speed mate-location and recognition videos
lab assay video metadata where public
bioacoustic or trajectory challenge datasets when mosquito-specific and licensed
completion_evidence: video questions return inspectable media locators, licenses, behavior labels, and provenance, or precise external availability gaps

domains.target_state: Brain atlas, cell atlas, sensory neuron, connectome, skeleton, voxel, study, and reanalysis records for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: MosquitoBrains, GEO/SRA, Mosquito Cell Atlas, CATMAID metadata, skeleton manifest, and source-gap records in the installed source index.
required_next_sources: complete public whole-brain Aedes connectome bulk package when available
computed SRA alignment and count receipts if raw reanalysis is executed
interactive atlas region and coordinate browser
completion_evidence: brain, neuron, cell atlas, skeleton, voxel, and connectome questions answer from records or explicit public-availability gaps

domains.target_state: Pathogen, strain, mosquito population, infection, dissemination, transmission, dose, temperature, tissue, and experimental-condition records.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates vector_competence records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 4,534 vector_competence records from aedes_literature_facets.
Vector competence questions route through the vector_competence lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.
aedes_pathogen_taxonomy anchors dengue, Zika, chikungunya, yellow fever, West Nile, and Mayaro virus identities to NCBI Taxonomy records for pathogen-specific Aedes aegypti questions.

aedes_vector_competence_assays extracts pathogen-specific assay-candidate records from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units, preserving source paper and full-text-unit provenance plus structured pathogen, infection, dissemination, transmission, dose, temperature, tissue, strain, population, and timepoint fields when detected.
required_next_sources: true table and supplement parsing for vector-competence assay rows, not only text-unit candidate extraction
manual or model-assisted validation labels for extracted assay candidates
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer pathogen-specific competence questions with assay context and provenance

domains.target_state: Insecticide susceptibility, resistance phenotype, mechanism, mutation, assay protocol, geography, and time records for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: IR Mapper public Aedes JSON endpoint is mapped as irmapper_aedes and filtered by default to Aedes aegypti and Ae. aegypti rows.
Installed records store raw IR Mapper rows in record_payloads with provenance to raw/irmapper/Aedes_aegypti.json row locators.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 2,843 resistance records from aedes_literature_facets.

Hosted artifact contains 6,449 aedes_resistance_markers records mapping kdr, VGSC, and metabolic-resistance marker mentions from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units into queryable resistance records with marker payloads, source locators, and zero marker-source gaps.
General resistance questions prefer the dedicated irmapper_aedes lane, while kdr and metabolic-marker questions prefer aedes_resistance_markers before literature-derived resistance facets.
required_next_sources: WHO insecticide resistance database availability review
validated marker-frequency, haplotype, and genotype table extraction from papers and supplements
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer resistance questions by species, country, insecticide class, assay, mutation, and source

domains.target_state: Habitat, climate, seasonality, range, breeding-site, urbanization, and environmental suitability evidence for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates ecology records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 5,253 ecology records from aedes_literature_facets.
Ecology questions route through the ecology lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.
aedes_occurrence_ecology joins indexed GBIF, iNaturalist, and Mosquito Alert observation payloads into country, country-month, seasonality, range, and public habitat ecology records.
The May 24, 2026 hosted ingest installed 1,985 aedes_occurrence_ecology records from 88,065 Aedes observation inputs, bringing the hosted ecology lane to 7,238 records.
required_next_sources: climate-linked GBIF and iNaturalist observation joins
climate and land-use layers with clear licenses
range and suitability model outputs
breeding-site and larval-habitat records from literature and surveillance reports
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer where, when, habitat, climate, seasonality, and range questions with source-backed records

domains.target_state: Surveillance, outbreak, intervention, vector-control, disease-transmission, and operational public-health records connected to Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates public_health records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 8,261 public_health records from aedes_literature_facets.
aedes_public_health_guidance maps official WHO, PAHO, and CDC guidance pages into public_health records with raw HTML receipts and source URLs.

aedes_paho_dengue_surveillance parses official PAHO dengue situation report HTML into regional week, year-to-date, subregion, serotype, and figure/table public_health records with raw HTML receipts and PAHO media locators.

PAHO/PLISA dengue dashboard pages are mapped as official sources, but their underlying country-week Tableau/PHIP rows remain a structured source gap until a stable machine-readable CSV, JSON, or API endpoint is available or authorized access is obtained.
Public-health questions route through the public_health lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.
required_next_sources: WHO dengue surveillance publications and dashboard exports where legally accessible
PAHO and national dengue or arbovirus reports where public
CDC ArboNET public summaries and data portals where accessible
structured intervention outcome and vector-control program datasets
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer surveillance, outbreak, intervention, and operational-control questions with date, place, disease, source, and provenance
